summary: Updated docs/features/blog.md to document the explicit-slug 409 conflict contract: BlogService.create() with an explicit slug and BlogService.update() when changing the slug to a colliding value now both return 409 Conflict (previously propagated as 500). Split slug validation rule into explicit-slug and auto-derived sub-bullets for clarity. Annotated admin POST and PATCH API route rows with the 409 slug-collision outcome.
